entities.name: RICE
entities.description: Indigenous and exotic aromatic rice germplasm studied for fragrance variation

entities.name: AROMA
entities.description: Fragrance variation in rice governed by the BADH2 gene

entities.name: BADH2
entities.description: Betaine aldehyde dehydrogenase 2, the gene responsible for aroma in rice

entities.name: BADH2-E7
entities.description: A functional allele of the BADH2 gene

entities.name: BADH2-P-5′UTR
entities.description: A functional allele of the BADH2 gene

entities.name: BADH2.2
entities.description: A functional allele of the BADH2 gene

entities.name: BADH2-E4-5.2
entities.description: A functional allele of the BADH2 gene

entities.name: BADH2-P1
entities.description: A newly reported allele found in aromatic rice

entities.name: BADH2-E7-P
entities.description: The BADH2 allele associated with functional polymorphism FP1

entities.name: FUNCTIONAL POLYMORPHISMS
entities.description: Variations in the BADH2 gene identified as FP1 to FP4

entities.name: FP1
entities.description: Functional polymorphism containing both badh2-p-5′UTR and badh2-E7 alleles

entities.name: FP2
entities.description: Functional polymorphism carrying only the badh2-E7 allele

entities.name: FP3
entities.description: Functional polymorphism carrying only the badh2-p-5′UTR allele

entities.name: FP4
entities.description: Functional polymorphism where none of the target aroma alleles were present

entities.name: 2AP CONTENT
entities.description: The level of 2-Acetyl-1-Pyrroline, a compound associated with aroma

entities.name: SENSORY EVALUATION
entities.description: Method used to assess the fragrance of rice genotypes

entities.name: MOLECULAR PROFILING
entities.description: The process of analyzing the BADH2 locus for allelic variability

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The location of the aromatic rice germplasm studied
